textByHashes.e3f8bc43f5c89924116e1a29b7cad6ab0224c8c9: Well done soldier! You've successfully completed the physical. You're free to do as you like.
textByHashes.fe63c388a90f8943148dae4088044eed362c7553: Just go through the gate in the fence and use the same door you came out of. You can come back whenever you like to tone up your body.
